arts.ttl: Sean Dyche reveals his Everton plans as Dan Friedkin closes in on £500m takeover
arts.sum: Sean Dyche's contract expires in July with a decision on his future lying with Dan Friedkin - and the Everton boss has shared what he hopes happens next

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche speaks out on new Everton contract for first time after Friedkin takeover
arts.sum: The Blues boss said his focus was on improving Everton's form but admitted he would like to get a new deal and be the manager who takes Everton into its new home

arts.ttl: Ex-Arsenal star Rob Holding's career hits humiliating new low after Crystal Palace snub
arts.sum: Rob Holding left Arsenal for Crystal Palace at the end of last summer's transfer window, but has endured a wretched time at Selhurst Park having had a falling out with boss Oliver Glasner

arts.ttl: Premier League make major rule change decision impacting Everton and Liverpool
arts.sum: Latest football news as new VAR technology introduction delayed long after intended start

arts.ttl: Everton and Dan Friedkin get £50m update from Chelsea after in-person talks
arts.sum: With Dan Friedkin all but guaranteed to take over Everton, attention will now turn to turning around the club’s finances just as much as their...

arts.ttl: Everton forward makes Manchester United vow and lifts lid on summer transfer
arts.sum: Toni Payne joined the Blues from Sevilla over the summer and is hopeful her experience can help take Brian Sorensen's side to the next level

arts.ttl: Dyche: U.S. takeover would bring Everton stability
arts.sum: Everton manager Sean Dyche has said that the new ownership will bring stability to the club amid its "unsettled ground."

arts.ttl: I was at Finch Farm on day it started to feel like Everton's luck might finally be about to improve
arts.sum: Everton FC correspondent Joe Thomas reports from Finch Farm, where he present in the aftermath of a new takeover deal and with a star player on the cusp of a return

arts.ttl: Everton fans' biggest fears may come true even after takeover announcement
arts.sum: The proposed takeover by Texas-based Friedkin Group is back on, it was announced, giving hope to the club’s long-suffering fans that more stable times lie ahead after such a turbulent period in its history. There was good news for storied English club Everton this week regarding the long-running saga over its ownership .

arts.ttl: Palace fans bring red and blue to Chicago fan festival
arts.sum: Crystal Palace's match against Manchester United was the star attraction at the latest Premier League Mornings Live fan festival, which took place in Chicago last weekend – and the Eagles were certainly backed by a sizeable crowd Stateside.
